section_miscategorizations.text: He reports that he drinks mostly water and no wine.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is more of a general social history/lifestyle detail than directly relevant to the current illness; however, it does not substantially distort the meaning of the HPI and is acceptable where it is.

section_miscategorizations.text: He is also a fan of the New York Yankees.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is non-clinical and unrelated to the visit; while out of place in HPI, it does not mislead clinically. It would typically be omitted rather than moved to another clinical section.
